item.title: UCB / Neurona Therapeutics Acquisition
item.description:
• Summary: UCB is acquiring Neurona Therapeutics for up to $1.15 billion, with $650 million upfront, to expand its epilepsy expertise with Neurona's cell therapy for drug-resistant epilepsy.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: BioSpace, Endpoints News

item.title: Neurogene Rett Syndrome Gene Therapy
item.description:
• Summary: Neurogene has hired a new Chief Commercial Officer as it prepares for the potential launch of its gene therapy for Rett syndrome, a rare neurological disorder. This strategic hire indicates advancing clinical development and commercial planning for the therapy.
  • MoAs: The gene therapy likely targets the MECP2 gene to restore function in Rett syndrome, utilizing viral vectors to deliver corrective genetic material.
  • Sources: Fierce Pharma
